title: GenomeLens Local Synteny
description: Run the local_synteny workflow through the gljcvimcscan center.
description_en: Run the local_synteny workflow through the gljcvimcscan center.
context: Target-gene-centered local synteny visualization across species.
context_en: Target-gene-centered local synteny visualization across species.

params.label: Input Mode
params.description: Choose BED+CDS or GFF+genome FASTA input mode.
params.description_en: Choose BED+CDS or GFF+genome FASTA input mode.

params.label: Target Gene IDs
params.description: Comma-separated target gene IDs for local synteny.
params.description_en: Comma-separated target gene IDs for local synteny.

params.label: Minimum Block Size
params.description: Minimum gene count for retained blocks.
params.description_en: Minimum gene count for retained blocks.

params.label: JCVI Layout File
params.description: Optional layout file for a curated local view.
params.description_en: Optional layout file for a curated local view.

params.label: JCVI Seqids File
params.description: Optional seqids file paired with the layout.
params.description_en: Optional seqids file paired with the layout.
